nasb.text: For the Lord’s indignation is against all the nations, And His wrath against all their armies; He has utterly destroyed them, He has given them over to slaughter.

esv.text: For the Lord is enraged against all the nations, and furious against all their host; he has devoted them to destruction, has given them over for slaughter.

cnv.text: 因為耶和華向列國發怒， 向他們所有的軍隊發烈怒， 要把他們滅盡， 要把他們交出來受屠殺。

ccb.text: 因为耶和华向列国发怒， 向他们的军队发烈怒。 祂要毁灭他们，杀尽他们。

csbs.text: 因为耶和华的震怒临到万国， 他的怒火临到他们的全军。 他要把他们灭绝净尽， 将他们交出去宰杀。
